title: EQ - Changed custom EQ, not saved, reset device, changes are not preset [TO BE VERIFIED]
scenario: Unsaved custom EQ changes persist after device reset instead of reverting to the last saved preset
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected Poly device name.
Select a custom EQ preset and modify some frequency band sliders (e.g., increase bass or treble).
Do NOT tap 'Save' or confirm the changes.
Press the Power button on the Poly device to turn it off.
Wait a few seconds, then press the Power button again to turn the device back on.
Re-open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Audio Settings → Equalizer.
expected: After device restart, the EQ values should return to the previously saved preset (the custom unsaved changes should be discarded).
